title: xiigen.i18n-translation.preferences-updated.v1
description: Terminal event emitted by T670 UserPreferencesManager after PUT /api/users/:userId/preferences has written a xiigen-user-preferences record. userOverride=true blocks subsequent tenant-default propagation (Decision 7 priority contract).

tenantId.description: Tenant owning the user record (ALS — CF-810).

userId.description: Document id — authenticated user whose preferences were written.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale the user selected, e.g. 'he', 'fr-FR'.

userOverride.description: true = user explicitly set this locale (blocks tenant-default propagation). false = 'use tenant default' reset path.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 write timestamp persisted on the xiigen-user-preferences document.
